title: Chemical Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Chemical Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives

1- To train chemical engineers who can have successful careers in management, production, design, and R&D activities in the chemical production, environment, food, health, and energy sectors, possessing technical knowledge and engineering competence, and who are open to interdisciplinary studies.

2- To educate graduates who are equipped to pursue academic careers at national and international levels, and who possess research, scientific thinking, and writing skills.

3- To train chemical engineering graduates who can solve real-life problems; take individual responsibility, work effectively in teams, and plan and execute engineering projects

4- To train graduates who are committed to ethical values, sensitive to public health and environmental sustainability, and capable of considering the social impacts of professional practices.

5- To educate graduates who can adapt to technological advancements, embrace lifelong learning, and are entrepreneurial and innovative individuals capable of assuming leadership roles in engineering applications.
